title: Give more %of space for navigation
excerpt: Hi, in my experience using the app, what I need to navigate is columns information, because the item content can be clicked and opened to read it completely. So my point is for better navigation of others columns content…

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, in my experience using the app, what I need to navigate is columns information, because the item content can be clicked and opened to read it completely. So my point is for better navigation of others columns content, the half size division should be divided into 40% and 60%.
